action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 9 (with RandomErasing) achieved 0.6789, which is worse than Iteration 5's 0.705. The many-shot accuracy dropped significantly (0.8412 -> 0.7997). Analysis: RandomErasing likely destroyed too much information for the many-shot classes, and 25 epochs wasn't enough to recover. Decision: Remove RandomErasing to revert exactly to the augmentations of Iteration 5. I will train for 28 epochs (slightly longer than 25) with pct_start=0.18 to allow slightly more convergence time at the end of the OneCycleLR schedule, keeping tau=1.2.
